# Acceptable Use Policy (Template)

Governs use of any system Aegis builds and hosts on a client's behalf (e.g. a Productized AI assistant, a booking system) — distinct from the public website's [Terms of Service](/terms-of-service.html), which covers use of aegishealthai.co.uk itself.

## Permitted use
Systems built by Aegis are to be used for their intended business purpose as scoped in the relevant Statement of Work — e.g. an AI Concierge answering genuine customer questions about the client's products/services.

## Prohibited use
The client (and the client's end users, where applicable) must not use a Aegis-built system to:
- Collect or process personal data beyond what was scoped and disclosed in the relevant [`DataProcessingAgreement.md`](DataProcessingAgreement.md), where one applies.
- Generate, distribute, or store unlawful content (harassment, fraud, illegal goods/services).
- Attempt to reverse-engineer, extract, or resell Aegis's underlying reusable product code (per [`MasterServiceAgreement.md`](MasterServiceAgreement.md) §3).
- Overload or attempt to disrupt the system's normal operation.

## AI-specific use
Where a system includes an AI assistant: it should not be represented to end users as a human, its known limitations (see the site's [AI Disclaimer](/ai-disclaimer.html)) should be respected in how it's deployed, and it should not be used to make decisions with legal or safety consequences for end users without human review.

## Consequences of breach
Aegis may suspend access to a hosted system on reasonable belief of a breach of this policy, with notice to the client where practicable, pending resolution.

## Contact
